creator: ahd@kew.com
text:
This one is so stupid I'm afraid to write it up, but what the hell ...

This fortune cites the wrong author:

   Yes, we will be going to OSI, Mars and, Pluto, but not necessarily in
   that order.
		   -- Jeffrey Honig

The correct source is "George Michaelson", whom Jeff cited in his
.plan file several years ago (and where I stole the quote from for
my own random .sig file generator).

Fix: 

Ignore or correct in fortune database.
How-To-Repeat: 
	 fortune -m Honig all
